headline: Expedia Group (EXPE) to Acquire CarTrawler to Expand B2B Mobility Platform
summary: Expedia Group Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) is one of the best quality growth stocks to buy. On May 20, Expedia entered into an agreement to acquire CarTrawler, an Irish B2B platform specializing in car rental, ground transport, and Insurtech solutions. This acquisition is a strategic move to advance Expedia’s goal of building the most comprehensive B2B travel […]
